name: HTTP请求
func:
import json
import urllib.request

def handler(*args, **kwargs):
    """发送 HTTP 请求并返回响应"""
    url = kwargs.get("url", "")
    method = kwargs.get("method", "GET")
    headers = kwargs.get("headers", {})
    body = kwargs.get("body")
    if not url:
        raise ValueError("缺少 url 参数")
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, method=method, headers=headers)
    if body and isinstance(body, dict):
        req.data = json.dumps(body).encode()
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
        return {"status_code": resp.status, "body": resp.read().decode()}
description: 发送 HTTP 请求，支持 GET/POST 等方法

name: 发送通知
func:
import logging

def handler(*args, **kwargs):
    """发送通知消息"""
    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    channel = kwargs.get("channel", "system")
    title = kwargs.get("title", "工作流通知")
    content = kwargs.get("content", "")
    recipients = kwargs.get("recipients", [])
    logger.info(f"[{channel}] 发送通知: {title} -> {len(recipients)}人")
    return {
        "channel": channel,
        "title": title,
        "recipient_count": len(recipients),
        "status": "sent"
    }
description: 发送系统通知、邮件或短信

name: 条件判断
func:
import json

def handler(*args, **kwargs):
    """条件分支：根据 upstream 结果决定走向"""
    upstream = kwargs.get("upstream", {})
    variables = kwargs.get("variables", {})
    field = kwargs.get("field", "status")
    expected = kwargs.get("expected", "success")
    operator = kwargs.get("operator", "eq")
    last = list(upstream.values())[-1] if upstream else {}
    actual = last.get(field) if isinstance(last, dict) else last
    operations = {
        "eq": lambda a, e: a == e,
        "ne": lambda a, e: a != e,
        "gt": lambda a, e: a > e,
        "lt": lambda a, e: a < e,
        "contains": lambda a, e: str(e) in str(a)
    }
    op = operations.get(operator, operations["eq"])
    result = op(actual, expected)
    return {"passed": result, "actual": actual, "expected": expected}
description: 根据上游节点输出判断分支走向

description: 转换上游节点的数据格式

name: 聚合汇总
func:
import json

def handler(*args, **kwargs):
    """聚合上游多个节点的输出"""
    upstream = kwargs.get("upstream", {})
    variables = kwargs.get("variables", {})
    results = {
        "node_count": len(upstream),
        "nodes": list(upstream.keys()),
        "values": list(upstream.values()),
        "variables": variables
    }
    return results
description: 将多个上游节点的输出聚合到一个结果中
